name: carboncoach
description: AI-assisted carbon awareness platform for understanding, tracking, and reducing personal carbon footprint through everyday decision coaching.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace packages/shared && npm run build --workspace services/api && npm run build --workspace apps/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace packages/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace packages/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace services/api && npm run typecheck --workspace apps/web
